specific_question: In the first half of 2025, what was the upsell rate for home charging stations when buying a vehicle from Elexion Automotive?
answer: According to the sales and marketing department of Elexion Automotive, during the first half of 2025, 60% of Elexion Automotive vehicle buyers also bought home charging stations at the time of vehicle purchase.
dr_question: How could Elexion Automotive utilize Automotive Cloud's dealer performance management tools by early 2027 to strengthen relationships with its North American dealer network and, at the same time, maintain 90% of its direct-to-government sales channel?
